creator: funman@videolan.org
text:
FTBFS multimedia/vlc 0.8.6h

I removed a undocumented patch in the update from 0.8.6f to 0.8.6h and its meaning was suddenly revealed to me by a user whose compile was broken.

Please commit this patch: http://git.videolan.org/?p=vlc.git;a=commitdiff_plain;h=133dfd250251b59cc67dc0496c01d478cd991b92

Please apply the patch at PR 118104 in the same time
